message:
Add slack_reply tool for posting threaded replies to arbitrary messages

New intercepted MCP tool that lets Scribble post threaded replies to
any Slack message by channel_id and thread_ts. This unblocks the
standup workflow where Scribble needs to reply in-thread to each
team member's standup post.

Follows the same intercepted-tool pattern as respond and log_decision:
MCP server defines the tool, orchestrator captures via onToolUse and
posts via Slack client.

Part of PRI-630.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
